    token: string;
    taskId?: string | undefined;
    stepId?: string | undefined;
}

    provider: string;

    outcome: string;
    duration_ms: number;
}

    task_id?: string;
    step_id?: string;
    capability?: string;

}

}

export class GatewayClient {
    constructor(options: GatewayClientOptions);
    complete(request: CompletionRequest, options: CompleteOptions): Promise<CompletionResponse>;
    modelClasses(options: {
        token: string;
    }): Promise<ModelClassesResponse>;
}

export interface GatewayClientOptions {
    url: string;
    fetchImpl?: typeof fetch;
}

const llmErrorBody: { validate: (value: unknown) => value is LlmErrorBody; errors: (value: unknown) => string[]; };

export interface LlmErrorBody {
    error: {
        class: LlmErrorClass;
        message: string;
        status: number;
        retry_after_s?: number;
    };
}

const llmErrorBodySchema: { readonly type: "object"; readonly required: readonly ["error"]; readonly additionalProperties: false; readonly properties: { readonly error: { readonly type: "object"; readonly required: readonly ["class", "message", "status"]; readonly additionalProperties: false; readonly properties: { readonly class: { readonly type: "string"; readonly enum: readonly ["invalid_input", "unauthenticated", "model_not_allowed", "model_class_unknown", "rate_limited", "unavailable", "killswitch"]; }; readonly message: { readonly type: "string"; }; readonly status: { readonly type: "integer"; }; readonly retry_after_s: { readonly type: "number"; readonly minimum: 0; }; }; }; }; };

export type LlmErrorClass = 'invalid_input' | 'unauthenticated' | 'model_not_allowed' | 'model_class_unknown' | 'rate_limited' | 'unavailable' | 'killswitch';

export class LlmGatewayError extends Error {
    readonly errorClass: LlmErrorClass;
    readonly status: number;
    readonly retryAfterS: number | undefined;
    constructor(errorClass: LlmErrorClass, message: string, status: number, retryAfterS?: number);
}

export interface ModelClassesResponse {
    version: string;
    classes: Record<string, {
        models: string[];
    }>;
}

export interface PromptBlock {
    role: PromptRole;
    text: string;
}

export type PromptRole = 'system' | 'user' | 'assistant';
